name: Data Modeler
description: Shape information structure to match real‑world use.

details.overview: I translates how things work in reality — equipment, processes, people — into a clear, logical structure that systems can use. Defining entities, attributes and connections so data is easy to understand and work with. I ensure the model is simple enough to use but detailed enough to be accurate. Bridging the gap between how people think and how computers store.
